_comment: Decarb-plan engagement state ledger for 4th & Madison (pseudonymous demo fixture, Task 2.3). Conforms to skills/decarb-plan/state-schema.json. phase='done': a completed engagement, ready to resume/render. Owner is fictional 'JP Metro Asset Management'; all figures assembled from building_setup.json / baseline.json / measures.json / economics.json / costing_cache.json / citations.json in this same demo/ directory. 'economics' and 'costing' are additive top-level extensions (state-schema.json does not restrict root additionalProperties).

kickoff.goal: Achieve compliance with the Metro City Building Performance Standard (BPS) ahead of the 2032 first-compliance deadline, while positioning the asset for a competitive disposition in ~10 years.

drivers.detail: Metro City BPS, first compliance year 2032, cap 30 kgCO2e/m2/yr, fine $268/tCO2e over cap
Owner wants a defensible decarbonization narrative ahead of a planned ~Year 10 disposition
Central hydronic furnace (2003) and central chiller (2010) both approach end of expected service life within the hold period

target.basis: Metro City BPS cap, 30 kgCO2e/m2/yr, first compliance year 2032

secondary_targets.basis: Owner-stated informal goal: at least 20% site carbon reduction from baseline within the hold period

kickoff.budget_ceiling: no hard ceiling set at kickoff; owner asked for phased capital tied to equipment replacement cycles where possible
kickoff.equipment_commitments: None binding at kickoff -- owner open to full electrification of the central plant at its natural replacement point.
financing_appetite: no PACE financing at this time

irr_hurdle.source: Not stated at kickoff -- owner deferred to the BPS compliance driver rather than a hard IRR hurdle for this plan.

cap_rate.source: Owner-confirmed exit cap assumption at kickoff, 6.0%

documents.name: 4th and Madison - Audette Data Request export.xlsx

gfa_m2.source: Building setup (P0), self-reported GFA, rounded to 2 sig figs for demo

peer_benchmark_eui_kwh_m2_yr.source: Building Performance Database (BPD), Office, comparable climate zone, 50,000-100,000 m2 size class

central_gas_plant.source: Office base-building HVAC/DHW plant -- landlord-paid and landlord-invested.

common_lighting.source: Base-building common-area and garage lighting -- landlord-paid.

rooftop_solar.source: Virtual net metering (VNM) revenue-sharing -- 80% landlord per standard VNM capture convention.

suggested.rule: Prefer the utility-benchmarking source of record for EUI/intensity calculations over rent-roll BOMA area, which can differ due to common-area/garage inclusion rules.

bps_milestones.requirement: Metro City BPS first compliance: <= 30 kgCO2e/m2/yr
bps_milestones.projected_status: non-compliant (34 kgCO2e/m2/yr projected, ~13% over cap) absent further measures beyond this plan

fine_exposure.residual_open_exposure_note: Post-plan intensity (34 kgCO2e/m2/yr) still exceeds the 30 kgCO2e/m2/yr cap -- ~350 tCO2e/yr residual exposure (~$93,203/yr) remains open; would require a further measure to fully close per measures.gap_statement.

roadmap_phases.label: Near-term, low disruption (Year 1)
roadmap_phases.trigger: No forced equipment trigger -- executed at hold-period start.

roadmap_phases.label: Chiller replacement cycle + Solar PV (Year 3)
roadmap_phases.trigger: Chiller reaches end of expected service life (~Year 3); roof access reused for solar install.

roadmap_phases.label: Central plant electrification (Year 6)
roadmap_phases.trigger: Central hydronic furnace reaches end of service life (~Year 6, est. 2032) -- coincides with BPS first compliance year.

measures.gap_statement: The full three-phase plan reduces site emissions 21% from baseline (3,600 -> 2,800 tCO2e/yr) and site energy 28% (135 -> 98 kWh/m2/yr), fully eliminating gas consumption by Year 6. Post-plan intensity (34 kgCO2e/m2/yr) still exceeds the Metro City BPS cap (30 kgCO2e/m2/yr), leaving ~350 tCO2e/yr of residual fine exposure that would require a further measure (e.g. additional renewable procurement) to fully close.

citations.claim: Baseline electricity consumption ~9,300,000 kWh/yr (112 kWh/m2/yr), calibrated from 24 months of utility billing data.
Baseline gas (fuel) consumption ~1,900,000 kWh-equivalent/yr (23 kWh/m2/yr), central hydronic furnace + DHW plant.
citations.source: Fuel delivery invoices + utility bill export, P1 calibration

citations.claim: Central plant heater is a hydronic_furnace (installed 2003) served via fan_coil_units -- native Audette equipment-survey mapping.
citations.source: Site condition assessment cross-walk + audette-modeling-recipes.md section 5a

citations.claim: Peer benchmark median site EUI for comparable Office assets is ~100 kWh/m2/yr.
citations.source: Building Performance Database (BPD), Office, comparable climate zone, 50,000-100,000 m2 size class

citations.claim: Metro City Building Performance Standard (BPS): first compliance year 2032, cap 30 kgCO2e/m2/yr, fine rate $268/tCO2e over cap.
citations.source: Fictional ordinance modeled on the structure of common large-building carbon-performance standards -- invented for this demo fixture

citations.claim: Solar PV virtual net metering (VNM) landlord capture of 80% used for the rooftop solar measure.
citations.source: Standard VNM capture convention (Soapbox reporting standard: solar VNM = 0.80 to landlord)

economics._ref: See skills/decarb-plan/demo/economics.json for the full waterfall, cashflow, and IRR detail. Summarized here for state-ledger completeness.

costing._ref: See skills/decarb-plan/demo/costing_cache.json for the full per-measure Costing MCP-style CapEx detail.
